parsed_output.justification: The transcript shows Paul repeatedly identifying himself as the werewolf, especially in the exchange where he states, “If you didn’t switch us, then I’m werewolf.” This implies he remained in his original position and eliminated any chance of being disguised as another role. Other players’ claims conflict, but Paul’s certainty signals an attempt to conceal that they actually started as werewolf and have not been swapped. Consequently, Paul is the most likely end‑role werewolf.
